title: Board Permissions that Allows Members and Viewers by Teams
excerpt: I would like the ability to add permission based access by teams to boards where certain teams can interact/add/adjust content and other teams can be viewers of other departments while still being able to interact with t…

posts.author: ACC.Web.Team (ACC Web Team)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like the ability to add permission based access by teams to boards where certain teams can interact/add/adjust content and other teams can be viewers of other departments while still being able to interact with their own content on specified boards.

posts.author: PeteFairhurst (Pete Fairhurst)
posts.cookedHtml: I also want to assign access to a board by granting a given “Team” permission rather than have to assign permission to a shareable / restricted board at a user level.
